name: Hearty Russian Beet Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover beans with water and allow to soak overnight.
2. Cook until tender; drain; set aside.
3. Place beef, bacon, and water in a large soup pot; bring to a boil.
4. Skim fat from the surface.
5. Add bay leaf, peppercorns, garlic, parsley, carrot, celery, onion, and salt.
6. Cover and simmer over low heat for about 1 1/2 hours.
7. Scrub beets for soup and cook in boiling water until tender, about 45 minutes; drain and discard the water; cool.
8. Peel and cut each beet into eighths.
9. Scrub small beets; grate them; cover with water to soak.
10. Remove meat from the soup; set aside.
11. Strain the soup into another pot and add cooked beets, cabbage, leeks, potatoes, tomatoes, tomato paste, vinegar, sugar, beef, and bacon.
12. Bring to a boil and simmer for 45 minutes.
13. Cut kielbasa into chunks and add with navy beans to the soup. Simmer for an additional 20 minutes.
14. Mix flour and butter together to form a paste. Stir into the soup to thicken slightly.
15. Strain raw beets, saving the liquid and discarding the beets.
16. Add beet liquid to the soup.
17. Additional sugar or vinegar may be added for sweeter or more sour flavor.
18. Slice meat and arrange in individual soup bowls.
19. Pour hot soup with vegetables over the meat.
20. Garnish each serving with a dollop of sour cream, if desired.
